title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft revealed seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The moves position Microsoft to challenge competitors while building a full-stack AI offering spanning reasoning models, agents, and quantum hardware.
